description: Patient received an unexpected imaging bill and wants coverage clarification.
transcript:
Hey, this is Luis Romero. I got a bill after an ultrasound on 2026-02-08 and I thought it was covered.
My insurance is Cigna and my member ID is CG-291001.
Can someone explain what happened and what I should do now?

gold.expected_next_step: Route to billing review with EOB and service date context.
